retry_reason: If wb_obj is NULL, there is nothing to free; if non-NULL, the free always succeeds. Retrying is not applicable because the object is either absent or has been freed.
contract_summary: Release wrapper for the write-back (wb) buffer object. Checks if wb_obj is non-NULL, then frees the underlying buffer object (including GPU address and CPU mapping) via amdgpu_bo_free_kernel, and sets the wb_obj pointer to NULL. Caller must not access wb after this call. This function is the destruction side of the wb lifecycle; it does not require any preceding get or set — it simply cleans up if the object exists. No reference is returned to the caller, so there is no ownership transfer. This is a finalization routine, typically called during device teardown.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release the wb buffer object via amdgpu_bo_free_kernel, which is a put function for the object's refcount. After the call, the wb pointer is set to NULL, preventing further use. No other business logic.
